title: Replace procedure best-metric menu explosion with dialog
description: Collapse procedure-card best evaluation/version actions into one dialog-driven action. The dialog should let the operator choose feedback vs regression and metric, then open the stored best evaluation and version for that selection. Keep the sort controls unchanged.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Replaced the expanded per-metric ProcedureTask menu entries with one "Find best evaluation…" action. The action opens a dialog where the operator selects feedback/regression and alignment/accuracy/precision/recall/cost, then opens the stored best evaluation or version for that selection. Focused frontend tests and dashboard typecheck pass.
